title: Stage 04a Pre-Review Gate
description: Stage 4.5a (Pre-Review) gate. Authored by dev-platform after running lint, type-check, and SCA across the merged build output. Stage 5 cannot start until this passes.

lint_passed.description: Project lint command exited cleanly across all areas. Failure routes the fix to the owning dev.

tests_passed.description: Unit tests in the integrated branch pass. Stage 6 re-runs the full suite with criterion mapping.

dependency_review_passed.description: Model-asserted by design: vulnerability scanning (npm audit, pip-audit, cargo-audit) requires toolchain availability and a current advisory database that the orchestrator cannot access offline, so the orchestrator defers CVE scan results to the platform agent and human review at Stage 5. See license_check_passed for the mechanically-verified counterpart.

license_check_passed.description: Orchestrator-stamped for Node projects: true when no denied licenses found in installed dependencies; false when at least one denied (strong-copyleft) license is detected. 'unverified-by-orchestrator' when the project is non-Node or node_modules is not installed — the orchestrator cannot verify the claim mechanically and the model's assertion stands; a warnings[] entry explains why. See license_findings[] for per-package detail.

license_findings.description: Per-package license findings for new or changed direct dependencies. Only include packages whose license is not 'allowed'; include all 'warned' and 'denied' entries. Omit packages on the default allowed list (MIT, Apache-2.0, BSD-2-Clause, BSD-3-Clause, ISC, CC0-1.0, 0BSD, Unlicense).

license.description: SPDX license identifier as declared by the package.

policy.description: allowed = on the project or default permissive list; warned = unknown or review-required (UNLICENSED, SSPL, BUSL); denied = strong copyleft that requires source disclosure (GPL-*, AGPL-*, LGPL-*).

note.description: Optional. Reason for the policy decision or exception.

security_review_required.description: When true, the Stage 4.5b security-engineer review is mandatory before Stage 5; trigger heuristic in scripts/security-heuristic.js.

migration_safety_required.description: Optional. When true, the Stage 04d migration-safety review is mandatory before Stage 5; trigger heuristic in core/guards/migration-heuristic.js fires on schema files, migrations directories, and DDL fragments in the diff. Distinct from security_review_required — a migration may need data-layer review even when no security concerns are raised.
